title: Collage
body:
Sends your screenshots to the server! Save folders go missing and people go - archive your screenshots server-side!

Works in dedicated servers and LAN worlds! Screenshots for the LAN owner are not saved.  
Files are saved to `<world save>/collage/screenshots/<player id>/<timestamp>.png`.

Compatible with permissions! Permission key: `collage.screenshot`

---

![screenshot client](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/collage/2025-11-01_02.53.36.png)

![screenshot server](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/collage/Screenshot%202025-11-01%20025516.png)
